mapper.select: select (case when job=1 then '班主任' when job=2 then '讲师' when job=3 then '学工主管' when job=4 then '教研主管' when job=5 then '咨询师' else '其他' end) pos, count(*) num from emp group by job order by num
select if(gender=1,'男性员工','女性员工') name, count(*) value from emp group by gender

#学历（1：初中 2：高中 3：大专 4：本科 5：硕士 6：博士） select (case when degree=1 then '初中' when degree=2 then '高中' when degree=3 then '大专' when degree=4 then '本科' when degree=5 then '硕士' when degree=6 then '博士' else '其他' end) name, count(*) value from student group by degree

select (case when clazz_id=1 then 'Java全栈就业班' when clazz_id=2 then 'Python数据分析班' when clazz_id=3 then '前端开发精英班' when clazz_id=4 then '大数据开发班' when clazz_id=5 then '软件测试实战班' when clazz_id=6 then 'UI设计精品班' when clazz_id=7 then 'Go语言后端班' when clazz_id=8 then '物联网开发班' when clazz_id=9 then '云计算运维班' when clazz_id=10 then '人工智能基础班' when clazz_id=11 then '网络安全工程师班' when clazz_id=12 then '清北班' when clazz_id=13 then '中医药学班' when clazz_id=14 then '雷霆嘎巴班' else '其他' end) pos, count(*) num from student group by clazz_id order by num
mapper.delete:
delete from emp where id in
#{id}
